title: Petit Pois Foldie
description: This rich, crispy Petit Pois Foldie is a cozy Egyptian dish featuring petit pois, with each bite offering a delightful contrast of textures and flavors.
instructions: Heat olive oil in a non-stick skillet over medium heat.
Whisk together flour and salt until well combined. Add to heated oil, stirring constantly with a wooden spoon or spatula to create a breadcrumb-like coating.
When the mixture is golden brown on one side (about 3-5 minutes), carefully flip using a spatula and continue frying until both sides are golden brown.
Remove from heat and serve immediately while still warm.
